alignments.candidate_evidence: Google Devices commercial operations leadership with global scaling experience
alignments.job_requirement: Achieve sales quotas for allocated accounts on a quarterly and annual basis

alignments.candidate_evidence: Led transformation programs and cross-functional stakeholder alignment at scale
alignments.job_requirement: Develop strategic, account-based marketing plans with marketing team

alignments.candidate_evidence: Product operations and commercial strategy background with requirements logic design and customer collaboration
alignments.job_requirement: Be trusted advisor understanding customer IT roadmap to drive solutions

gaps.gap: Pure quota-carrying field sales experience: 10–15+ years field sales required, none evident in candidate profile
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has strategic operations and cross-functional leadership; could transition to consultative account-leadership role, but would require quota ramp and new sales process discipline

gaps.gap: Seven-figure deal closure and sophisticated sales negotiation track record not demonstrated
gaps.mitigation: Google scale implies complex stakeholder navigation; would need to prove deal-closure capability in enterprise sales context

gaps.gap: Executive-level relationship management and C-level stakeholder influence in customer negotiation contexts
gaps.mitigation: Candidate has cross-functional influence at Google; customer-facing C-suite advisory experience not explicit

gaps.gap: Financial Services and Banking customer domain experience not mentioned
gaps.mitigation: Industry expertise can be acquired; product and operations skills are transferable, but customer segment-specific credibility is absent

output.level_rationale: JD requires 10–15+ years field sales with complex/strategic customer focus, multi-year seven-figure deal closure, and executive relationship management. These anchors point to an established L5 senior individual contributor or early L6 account leadership role at an enterprise software vendor. No manager-of-managers scope is explicit; reporting line and company stage unknown. 10–15+ years is the limiting anchor for L5–L6 range.
output.summary: Global Account Manager—Snowflake (HSBC). Role is pure quota-carrying enterprise field sales with 10–15+ years requirement, seven-figure deal closure, and C-suite advisory mandate—a core deprioritize family for this candidate. No disqualifying hard blockers, but candidate has zero demonstrated field sales, quota management, or customer-facing deal-closure experience; background is internal product operations and transformation strategy. Estimated role level is L5, within target band, but role fit is fundamentally misaligned: quota sales is explicitly deprioritized. Skip recommended unless candidate has hidden sales track record.
uncertainties: Candidate's customer-facing and CxO relationship depth not fully detailed in profile
